fallbackSeo.description: Saskia Neuman Gallery represents Nordic and internationally based artists. The exhibition program reflects a strong focus on early and mid-career artists, often previously not exhibited in Sweden’s commercial gallery sphere. In addition, the gallery aims to host a variety of happenings, including talks, performances and other events.
fallbackSeo.title: Saskia Neuman Gallery
